'''鈭歾-z-s-th''' ('''kazazsethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:velvet|velvet]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-z-s-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:velvet|velvet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-z-s-th
|-
! Lemma
| kazazsethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizazsethoko|thizazsethoko]] || [[word:jizazsethoko|jizazsethoko]] || [[word:shizazsethoko|shizazsethoko]] || [[word:kizazsethoko|kizazsethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzazsethoko|thuthuzazsethoko]] || [[word:jujuzazsethoko|jujuzazsethoko]] || [[word:shushuzazsethoko|shushuzazsethoko]] || [[word:kukuzazsethoko|kukuzazsethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozazsethoko|thozazsethoko]] || [[word:jozazsethoko|jozazsethoko]] || [[word:shozazsethoko|shozazsethoko]] || [[word:kozazsethoko|kozazsethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zazsethoko|th忙zazsethoko]] || [[word:j忙zazsethoko|j忙zazsethoko]] || [[word:sh忙zazsethoko|sh忙zazsethoko]] || [[word:k忙zazsethoko|k忙zazsethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
